person.userCertifiedLifeSummary:
geni.com
Folmar VII de Metz (von Metz), comte de Metz
Also Known As:	"Volmar van Metz", "Graf von Metz"
Birthdate:	circa 1060
Birthplace:	Metz, Moselle, Lorraine, France
Death:	June 25, 1111 (46-55)
Monastery Rixheim, Germany
Immediate Family:	
Son of Folmar VI de Metz, comte de Metz and Svanehilde (Swanhilde) I NN, comtesse de Metz
Husband of NN
Father of 
Folmar von Metz, VIII, Graf von Metz; 
Hugues / Hugo de Metz and 
Theogar de Metz, Bishop of Metz

Brother of possible daughter Swanhilde ? de Metz and Gottfried von Metz, III, Graf im Bliesgau

zh.lifeSummary: 當Folmar IV de  Metz於大約1070年出生在法國洛萊莫瑟勒梅斯時，他的父親Folmar III von Metz23歲，母親Swanhilde14歲。他至少有1個兒子。他去世於1111年6月25日在德國艾爾薩斯-洛斯林根貝可 奧貝雷爾薩斯可萊斯 姆爾利豪森享年42歲，埋葬在法國莫瑟勒利潔海姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Folmar IV de  Metz于大约1070年出生在法国洛萊莫瑟勒梅斯时，他的父亲Folmar III von Metz23岁，母亲Swanhilde14岁。他至少有1个儿子。他去世于1111年6月25日在德国艾爾薩斯-洛斯林根貝可 奧貝雷爾薩斯可萊斯 姆爾利豪森享年42岁，埋葬在法国莫瑟勒利潔海姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Metz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from a short form of the female personal name Mechthild, composed of ancient Germanic maht ‘might, strength’ + hild ‘strife, battle’.

German, French (Alsace and Lorraine), and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name from Metz in Lorraine, which took its name from a Gaulish tribe, the Mediomatrici; in the name of the place this became abbreviated to Mettis, hence the modern name.
German: from Mätz, a short form of the personal name Matthias (see Matthew ).

variants.name: Mette
meanings: North German: from a pet form of the female personal name Mechthild (see Metz ).
North German: occupational name for a miller, from Middle Low German matte, mette ‘dry measure’.
French: topographic name from Old French mete ‘boundary stone, boundary’ (from Latin meta ‘bounded estate’).

variants.name: Metzer
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): habitational name for someone from Metz (see   Metz  ).
Dutch: occupational name for a bricklayer, Middle Dutch metsere.

variants.name: Metts
meanings: Americanized form of German   Metz  .

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

variants.name: Metze
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Armin, Gerhard, Gernot.
German:
metronymic from a short form of the personal name Mechthild (see Metz 1).

nameMeanings.name: Folmar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Americanized form of German   Vollmar  .

variants.name: Vollmar
meanings: from folk ‘people’ + mar ‘famous’.

nameMeanings.name: IV
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: probably a contracted form of  Jep , vernacular form of   Jacob   .

en.lifeSummary: When Folmar IV de  Metz was born about 1070, in Metz, Moselle, Lorraine, France, his father, Folmar III von Metz, was 23 and his mother, Swanhilde, was 14. He had at least 1 son. He died on 25 June 1111, in Mülhausen, Upper Alsace, Alsace-Lorraine, Germany, at the age of 42, and was buried in Lixheim, Moselle, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Folmar IV de  Metz est né environ 1070, à Metz, Moselle, Lorraine, France, son père, Folmar III von Metz, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Swanhilde, avait 14 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 25 juin 1111, à Kreis Mülhausen, Haute-Alsace, Alsace-Lorraine, Allemagne, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Lixheim, Moselle, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Folmar IV de  Metz um 1070 in Metz, Mosel, Lothringen, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Folmar III von Metz 23 und seine Mutter Swanhilde 14. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 25. Juni 1111 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Kreis Mülhausen, Bezirk Oberelsaß, Elsaß-Lothringen, Deutschland und wurde in Lixheim, Moselle, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Folmar IV de  Metz è nato il circa 1070 nel Metz, Moselle, Lorraine, Francia, il suo padre, Folmar III von Metz, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Swanhilde, aveva 14 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 25 giugno 1111, nel Kreis Mülhausen, Bezirk Oberelsaß, Elsaß-Lothringen, Germania, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Lixheim, Moselle, Francia.

ko.lifeSummary: Folmar IV de  Metz(이)가 대략 1070년 프랑스 로레이인 모셀 멧즈에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Folmar III von Metz(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Swanhilde(은)는 14세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1111년 6월 25일 독일 엘사ss-로스링 베지르크 오버사ss 크레이스 u하우센에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 모셀 릭스하임에 묻혔다.

Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 25 de junho de 1111, em Kreis Mülhausen, Bezirk Oberelsaß, Elsaß-Lothringen, Alemanha, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Lixheim, Moselle, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Folmar IV de  Metz родился около 1070 г. в местности мец, моселл, лорреаин, Франция, его отцу по имени Folmar III von Metz было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Swanhilde, 14. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 25 июня 1111 г. в местности крис мuлхаусен, безирк обирэлсаss, элсаss-лотринген, Германия в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности ликсхим, моселл, Франция.
